item.title: 苹果或推出官方租赁服务：iPhone 租期 24 个月，Mac 租期 36 个月
item.guid: 苹果或推出官方租赁服务：iPhone-租期-24-个月，Mac-租期-36-个月
item.description:
According to Bloomberg, Apple plans to launch its "Apple Upgrade" device leasing service on July 28, covering most iPhone, Mac, iPad, and Apple Watch models. The service will first launch in the United States, supporting both Apple's offline retail stores and official website channels, with Apple partnering with Klarna for financial backing. 据彭博社报道，苹果计划于 7 月 28 日推出「Apple Upgrade」设备租赁服务，覆盖大多数 iPhone、Mac、iPad 和 Apple Watch 机型。该服务将首先在美国上线，同时支持苹果线下零售店和官网渠道，苹果与 Klarna 合作，由后者提供资金支持。

The "Apple Upgrade" operates similarly to a subscription service, allowing users to pay off the device early, upgrade early during the lease term, or keep or return the device after the lease ends. 「Apple Upgrade」的运作方式类似订阅服务，用户可在租赁期内提前付清设备款、提前换新，也可以在租期结束后保留设备或归还设备。

The lease term for iPhones and Apple Watches is 24 months, and for Macs and iPads, it's 36 months. Users will need to pass a soft credit check. Some early repayment, upgrade, or device retention operations may incur additional fees. iPhone 和 Apple Watch 的租期为 24 个月，Mac 和 iPad 为 36 个月，用户需要通过软信用审查。部分提前还款、换新或保留设备的操作可能产生额外费用。

Apple plans to market the service as a way to lower monthly payments and will stop new user registrations for the existing iPhone Upgrade Program and standard installment plans. 苹果计划将该服务宣传为降低月供的购买方式，并停止现有 iPhone Upgrade Program 和标准分期付款计划的新用户注册。

Unlike the current iPhone Upgrade Program, Apple Upgrade does not include AppleCare. Devices such as Apple Watch SE, entry-level iPads, iPhone 16, and MacBook Neo are also not part of the plan, and enterprise and educational users are not applicable. 与当前的 iPhone Upgrade Program 不同，Apple Upgrade 不包含 AppleCare，Apple Watch SE、入门款 iPad、iPhone 16 和 MacBook Neo 等设备也不参与该计划，企业和教育用户同样不在适用范围内。

item.title: Google 发布 Gemini 3.6 Flash，输出 token 使用量减少 17%
item.guid: Google-发布-Gemini-3.6-Flash，输出-token-使用量减少-17%
item.description:
Google today released Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber for code security. Google 今天发布 Gemini 3.6 Flash、3.5 Flash-Lite 和面向代码安全的 3.5 Flash Cyber。

Gemini 3.6 Flash reduces output tokens by 17% compared to 3.5 Flash and lowers inference steps and tool calls in multi-step workflows. Gemini 3.6 Flash 相比 3.5 Flash 减少 17% 输出 Token，并降低多步工作流中的推理步骤和工具调用次数。

API pricing is $1.5 per million input tokens and $7.5 per million output tokens; DeepSWE score increased from 37% to 49%, OSWorld-Verified from 78.4% to 83%, and knowledge cutoff updated to March 2026. API 定价为每百万输入 Token 1.5 美元、输出 Token 7.5 美元；DeepSWE 得分由 37% 提高到 49%，OSWorld-Verified 由 78.4% 提高到 83%，知识截止时间更新至 2026 年 3 月。

Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite is designed for high-throughput, low-latency search and document processing, with pricing at $0.3 per million input tokens and $2.5 per million output tokens, respectively. Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite 面向高吞吐、低延迟搜索和文档处理，每百万输入、输出 Token 分别为 0.3 美元和 2.5 美元。

3.5 Flash Cyber is used to find, verify, and fix code vulnerabilities, with the first batch only available to government and trusted partners. Google also stated that Gemini 4 has started its largest pre-training run to date. 3.5 Flash Cyber 用于查找、验证和修复代码漏洞，首批只向政府与可信合作伙伴开放。Google 同时表示，Gemini 4 已启动目前规模最大的预训练运行。

🔗 Related reading: Just now, Gemini 3.6 Flash was officially released, but netizens laughed even louder 🔗 相关阅读： 刚刚，Gemini 3.6 Flash 正式发布，但网友笑得更大声了

item.title: OpenAI 称模型曾突破沙盒、入侵 Hugging Face 基础设施
item.guid: OpenAI-称模型曾突破沙盒、入侵-Hugging-Face-基础设施
item.description:
According to official OpenAI disclosure, during an internal network capability assessment, two of its models, including GPT-5.6 Sol, broke through testing environment restrictions and accessed test reference answers in Hugging Face's production infrastructure. 据 OpenAI 官方披露，在内部网络能力评估中，旗下包括 GPT-5.6 Sol 在内的两款模型突破了测试环境限制，并访问了 Hugging Face 生产基础设施中的测试参考答案。

OpenAI referred to it as an "unprecedented network incident" and is currently collaborating with Hugging Face on investigation and remediation efforts. OpenAI 将其称为一起「前所未有的网络事件」，目前正与 Hugging Face 共同展开调查和修复工作。

This incident occurred during an internal assessment called ExploitGym. OpenAI stated that the model first exploited a previously unknown vulnerability in an internally hosted package registry agent to gain internet access, then performed privilege escalation and lateral movement within the research testing environment. 这次事件发生在名为 ExploitGym 的内部评估中。OpenAI 表示，模型首先利用内部托管的软件包注册代理中的一个此前未知漏洞，获得了互联网访问能力，随后在研究测试环境中进行权限提升和横向移动。

After gaining external network access, the model inferred that Hugging Face might store ExploitGym-related models, datasets, and answers. It then used stolen credentials and other vulnerabilities to find a remote code execution path on Hugging Face servers, ultimately accessing test information in the production database. 获得外网访问后，模型推断 Hugging Face 可能存储了 ExploitGym 相关的模型、数据集和答案，并通过被盗凭证及其他漏洞，在 Hugging Face 服务器上找到远程代码执行路径，最终接触到生产数据库中的测试信息。

OpenAI stated that it has implemented stricter configuration controls on relevant infrastructure, responsibly disclosed zero-day vulnerabilities in agents to software vendors, and will strengthen the isolation, monitoring, access control, and security protection of future training and evaluation environments. OpenAI 表示，已对相关基础设施实施更严格的配置控制，并负责地向软件供应商披露了代理中的零日漏洞，同时将加强未来训练和评估环境的隔离、监控、访问控制与安全防护。

item.title: 曝苹果正打样约 7 英寸屏幕，或用于 iPhone 20 Pro Max
item.guid: 曝苹果正打样约-7-英寸屏幕，或用于-iPhone-20-Pro-Max
item.description:
According to blogger 'Digital Chat Station', Apple is prototyping a mobile phone screen with a physical size of about 6.96 inches and a standard size close to 7 inches. This screen may be used in the iPhone 20 Pro Max, but it has not yet received official confirmation from Apple. 据博主「数码闲聊站」爆料，苹果正在打样一块物理尺寸约为 6.96 英寸、标准尺寸接近 7 英寸的手机屏幕，该屏幕有可能用于 iPhone 20 Pro Max，但目前尚未获得苹果官方确认。

The blogger also stated in the comments section that the new screen's aspect ratio is close to that of current 6.9-inch models, and it will still take into account the grip experience. The screen size of Apple's Pro Max series has previously gradually increased from 6.7 inches to 6.9 inches, with the iPhone 16 Pro Max being the first to adopt a 6.9-inch screen, and subsequent models continuing this size. 该博主还在评论区表示，新屏幕的屏幕比例与当前 6.9 英寸机型接近，仍会兼顾握持体验。苹果 Pro Max 系列的屏幕尺寸此前已从 6.7 英寸逐步增至 6.9 英寸，其中 iPhone 16 Pro Max 首次采用 6.9 英寸屏幕，后续机型延续了这一尺寸。

Supply chain sources also state that the iPhone 20 Pro and iPhone 20 Pro Max may adopt a quad-curved screen design and feature under-display Face ID to reduce front-facing cutouts. 供应链消息还称，iPhone 20 Pro 和 iPhone 20 Pro Max 可能采用四微曲屏设计，并搭载屏下 Face ID，以减少正面开孔。

item.title: Kimi K3 进入微软内部测试，或为 Copilot 提供模型支持
item.guid: Kimi-K3-进入微软内部测试，或为-Copilot-提供模型支持
item.description:
According to 'The Information', Microsoft is testing Moonshot AI's Kimi K3, evaluating whether it can be used for Copilot, and plans to integrate the model into Azure. Currently, Kimi K3 is still in the internal testing and platform integration phase and has not yet officially become an optional model for Copilot. 据《The Information》报道，微软正在测试月之暗面 Kimi K3，评估其是否能够用于 Copilot，并计划将该模型接入 Azure。目前，Kimi K3 仍处于内部测试和平台接入阶段，尚未正式成为 Copilot 的可选模型。

The report cited sources saying that Microsoft Copilot engineers are testing whether Kimi K3 can handle some of the functions previously handled by OpenAI and Anthropic models. Microsoft has added Kimi K3 to Azure, but the specific availability time, service regions, and pricing have not yet been announced. 报道援引知情人士称，微软 Copilot 工程师正测试 Kimi K3 是否能够承担此前由 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 模型负责的部分功能。微软已将 Kimi K3 加入 Azure，具体开放时间、服务地区和价格尚未公布。

Kimi K3 is an open-source model with 2.8 trillion parameters, achieving high scores in some benchmark tests. However, the larger model size also means higher deployment and inference costs. Kimi K3 是一个拥有 2.8 万亿参数的开源模型，在部分基准测试中取得较高成绩。不过，模型规模较大也意味着更高的部署和推理成本。

'The Information' cited Arena CEO Anastasios Angelopoulos as saying that the running cost of Kimi K3 is roughly equivalent to Anthropic's Claude Sonnet series. 《The Information》援引 Arena CEO Anastasios Angelopoulos 的说法称，Kimi K3 的运行成本大致相当于 Anthropic 的 Claude Sonnet 系列。

Microsoft has continuously expanded the range of models supported by Copilot and Azure in recent years. Previously, GitHub Copilot launched Moonshot AI's Kimi K2.7 Code, and Microsoft Foundry has also provided models such as Kimi K2, Kimi K2.5, and Kimi K2.6. 微软近年来持续扩充 Copilot 和 Azure 支持的模型范围。此前，GitHub Copilot 已上线月之暗面的 Kimi K2.7 Code，Microsoft Foundry 也已提供 Kimi K2、Kimi K2.5 和 Kimi K2.6 等模型。

If Kimi K3 is eventually officially integrated, Azure customers will be able to call the model through Microsoft's cloud computing, billing, and enterprise management systems. 若 Kimi K3 最终正式接入，Azure 客户将可以通过微软的云计算、计费和企业管理体系调用该模型。

item.title: 腾讯整合 QClaw 与 WorkBuddy 团队
item.guid: 腾讯整合-QClaw-与-WorkBuddy-团队
item.description:
Leifeng.com cited an internal Tencent organizational adjustment notice stating that the relevant businesses and some teams of Tencent QClaw Product Center will be adjusted to Cloud Product Department Six, and QClaw products will continue to operate. Cloud Product Department Six is also the department to which the office intelligent agent WorkBuddy belongs, and this adjustment places the two intelligent agent product lines under the same organization. 雷峰网援引腾讯内部组织调整通知称，腾讯 QClaw 产品中心相关业务和部分团队将调整至云产品六部，QClaw 产品继续运营。云产品六部也是办公智能体 WorkBuddy 所属部门，这次调整把两条智能体产品线放到同一组织下。

QClaw was developed by the Tencent PC Manager team based on OpenClaw and began internal testing in March this year. A recent report released by Analysys International stated that WorkBuddy's monthly visits in the domestic PC-side AI-native office intelligent agent market exceeded 20 million in June this year. QClaw 由腾讯电脑管家团队基于 OpenClaw 开发，今年 3 月开启内测。易观分析近日发布的报告称，WorkBuddy 今年 6 月在国内 PC 端 AI 原生办公智能体市场的单月访问量超过 2000 万。

item.title: 曝小米上调今年手机出货目标至 1.1 亿部
item.guid: 曝小米上调今年手机出货目标至-1.1-亿部
item.description:
Jiemian News learned from the supply chain that Xiaomi has raised its 2026 smartphone shipment target from approximately 90 million units to 110 million units, with the new additions mainly coming from low-end models. The report cited sources close to Xiaomi as saying that the company internally believes the storage market trend may reverse. 界面新闻从供应链获悉，小米已把 2026 年智能手机出货目标从约 9000 万部上调至 1.1 亿部，新增部分主要来自低端机型。报道援引接近小米的人士称，公司内部判断存储行情可能出现反转。

Xiaomi's initial target at the beginning of the year was about 170 million units, which was subsequently lowered to 135 million units and then to about 95 million units due to rising storage prices. The report also pointed out that mobile phone manufacturers have begun to resist new quotes from storage manufacturers, but consumer-grade storage supply is still squeezed by HBM and server DRAM production capacity. 小米年初的目标约为 1.7 亿部，随后受存储价格上涨影响先后下调至 1.35 亿部和约 9500 万部。报道同时指出，手机厂商开始抵制存储厂商的新报价，但消费级存储供应仍受 HBM 与服务器 DRAM 产能挤占。

TrendForce data shows that in Q1 2026, DRAM contract prices rose by 90% to 95%, and NAND Flash rose by 55% to 60%; in Q2, both rose again by 58% to 64% and 54% to 75% respectively. The report cited industry estimates stating that for phones under $200, storage costs account for over 30% of the bill of materials. TrendForce 数据显示，2026 年第一季度 DRAM 合约价上涨 90% 至 95%，NAND Flash 上涨 55% 至 60%；第二季度两者又分别上涨 58% 至 64% 和 54% 至 75%。报道援引行业测算称，200 美元以下手机的存储成本占物料成本超过 30%。

item.title: 消息称阿里将整合三款智能体推出「千问办公」
item.guid: 消息称阿里将整合三款智能体推出「千问办公」
item.description:
According to 'Caijing' report, Alibaba plans to integrate three intelligent agents, QoderWork, Wukong, and MuleRun, into 'Qianwen Office', which will be led by DingTalk's new CEO, Chen Yusen. The product will be based on QoderWork and target the office intelligent agent market. 据《财经》报道，阿里计划把 QoderWork、悟空和 MuleRun 三款智能体整合为「千问办公」，由钉钉新任 CEO 陈宇森负责。产品将以 QoderWork 为基础，面向办公智能体市场。

The three products target different users and markets, and the integration also involves existing user rights, team ownership, and resource reallocation. The report also stated that Qianwen Office will need to connect with DingTalk's existing customer base in the manufacturing, government, education, and small and medium-sized enterprise markets. 三款产品分别面向不同用户和市场，整合还涉及现有用户权益、团队归属与资源重新配置。报道还称，千问办公后续需要与钉钉在制造、政务、教育和中小企业市场的现有客户体系衔接。

Chen Yusen succeeded Chen Hang as DingTalk CEO in June this year and began overseeing the integration of the three intelligent agents in early July. The report believes that in addition to product integration, the personnel and resource allocation of the three original teams also need to be addressed. 陈宇森今年 6 月接替陈航出任钉钉 CEO，7 月初开始负责三款智能体的整合。报道认为，产品整合之外还要处理三个原有团队的人员与资源配置。

item.title: 张一鸣向芳梅公益基金追加捐赠 3 亿元
item.guid: 张一鸣向芳梅公益基金追加捐赠-3-亿元
item.description:
The Longyan Education Bureau disclosed today that ByteDance founder Zhang Yiming has made an additional donation of 300 million yuan to the Fangmei Public Welfare Foundation. Of this, 200 million yuan will be used for astronomical popular science education, student interest cultivation, educational informatization construction in Longyan City, and improving infrastructure in some schools in Yongding District and Shanghang County; another 100 million yuan will be used for local medical talent training and medical equipment improvement. 龙岩市教育局今日披露，字节跳动创始人张一鸣向芳梅公益基金追加捐赠 3 亿元，其中 2 亿元用于龙岩市天文科普教育、学生兴趣培养、教育信息化建设，以及改善永定区和上杭县部分学校基础设施；另有 1 亿元用于当地医护人才培养和医疗设备改善。

The Fangmei Education Development Foundation has also been upgraded to the Fangmei Public Welfare Foundation, expanding its scope from educational development to education, medical health, and public assistance. Zhang Yiming first donated 500 million yuan in 2021, added another 200 million yuan in 2023, and after this round, the cumulative donation will reach 1 billion yuan. 芳梅教育发展基金同时升级为芳梅公益基金，使用范围从教育发展扩大到教育、医疗健康和公益援助。张一鸣在 2021 年首次捐赠 5 亿元，2023 年追加 2 亿元，本轮完成后累计捐赠规模达到 10 亿元。

The foundation has launched projects such as the "Fangmei Teaching Award" and "Fangmei Lecture Hall". Among them, the teaching award has cumulatively covered over 1000 teachers and more than 100 groups, with a total amount distributed exceeding 50 million yuan; the cumulative number of participants in teacher training has exceeded 50,000. 基金已发起「芳梅奖教金」「芳梅讲堂」等项目，其中奖教金累计覆盖超过 1000 名教师和 100 多个集体，发放金额超过 5000 万元；教师培训累计参与人数超过 5 万。

item.title: Infinity 融资 1500 万美元，用 AI 为不同芯片编写推理软件
item.guid: Infinity-融资-1500-万美元，用-AI-为不同芯片编写推理软件
item.description:
AI infrastructure company Infinity completed a $15 million seed round of financing, valuing the company at $100 million post-investment. Touring Capital, Principal Venture Partners, chip company executives, and researchers from OpenAI and Anthropic participated in this round. The funds will be used to expand the engineering team, scale the automated AI research platform, and advance collaborations with chip companies such as d-Matrix. AI 基础设施公司 Infinity 完成 1500 万美元种子轮融资，投后估值为 1 亿美元。Touring Capital、Principal Venture Partners、芯片公司高管以及来自 OpenAI、Anthropic 的研究人员参与本轮，资金将用于扩充工程团队、扩大自动化 AI 研究平台，并推进与 d-Matrix 等芯片公司的合作。

Infinity's Ignition intelligent agent automatically generates, tests, and optimizes underlying inference code for new chips. The company states that Ignition increased the inference throughput of Qwen3-8B to approximately 20,000 Tokens per second in one day, a 14-fold increase compared to the initial approximately 1,400 Tokens per second, and 34% higher than vLLM; this test result has not yet been independently verified. Infinity 的 Ignition 智能体会为新芯片自动生成、测试和优化底层推理代码。公司称，Ignition 在一天内把 Qwen3-8B 的推理吞吐提升至约每秒 2 万 Token，相比初始约每秒 1400 Token 提升 14 倍，并比 vLLM 高出 34%；这一测试结果尚未经过独立验证。

The company is currently collaborating with d-Matrix on chip design, stating that related businesses have generated millions of dollars in annual recurring revenue. Infinity charges based on the actual improvement in inference throughput, typically receiving about 20% of the new computing power procurement costs saved by customers. 公司目前与 d-Matrix 开展芯片设计合作，称相关业务已产生数百万美元年度经常性收入。Infinity 按推理吞吐的实际提升收费，通常从客户因此节省的新增算力采购成本中获得约 20% 分成。

item.title: Google 研发 Frozen v2 芯片，把部分 Gemini 架构写入硬件
item.guid: Google-研发-Frozen-v2-芯片，把部分-Gemini-架构写入硬件
item.description:
According to The Information, Google is developing a server chip internally codenamed Frozen v2, hoping to reduce computation and data transfer during inference by solidifying part of the Gemini model's architecture into hardware. Google engineers estimate that its token processing capability per unit of power consumption can reach 6 to 10 times that of the latest generation of TPUs. 据 The Information 报道，谷歌正在研发内部代号为 Frozen v2 的服务器芯片，希望通过把 Gemini 模型的部分架构固化进硬件，减少推理时的计算量与数据传输。谷歌工程师预计，它的单位功耗 Token 处理能力可达到最新一代 TPU 的 6 至 10 倍。

Frozen v2 is planned for deployment in 2028 and will not replace general-purpose TPUs but will serve as a specialized branch for specific model architectures. The trade-off is reduced flexibility: the chip will only be compatible with new versions if subsequent Gemini models continue to use the same underlying architecture. Frozen v2 计划于 2028 年部署，不会取代通用 TPU，而是作为面向特定模型架构的专用分支。代价是灵活性下降：只有后续 Gemini 继续沿用相同底层架构，芯片才能兼容新版本。

Google responded that the company continuously researches co-design of software and hardware, but not all experimental projects will enter mass production. Currently, Frozen v2 is still an experimental project, and there are no plans for large-scale production like TPUs. Google 回应称，公司持续研究软硬件协同设计，但并非所有试验项目都会进入量产。目前 Frozen v2 仍是试验性项目，暂无像 TPU 一样大规模生产的计划。

🔗 Related Reading: Google to "Engrave" AI Large Models into Chips 🔗 相关阅读： Google 要把 AI 大模型「刻」进芯片里

item.title: 智谱建成 1GW 级国产算力中心并收购中科加禾
item.guid: 智谱建成-1GW-级国产算力中心并收购中科加禾
item.description:
"KeChuangBan Daily" reported that Zhipu has established a 1GW-level domestic AI computing data center, entirely using domestic AI chips. The company also completed the acquisition of Zhongke Jiahe, a domestic heterogeneous computing software company, today. 《科创板日报》报道，智谱已落地 1GW 级国产 AI 算力数据中心，全部采用国产 AI 芯片。公司今日还完成对国产异构算力软件公司中科加禾的收购。

Zhongke Jiahe originated from the Compilation Laboratory of the Institute of Computing Technology, Chinese Academy of Sciences, with business covering compilers, Runtime, and inference engines. Zhipu uses the data center to supplement the computing resources needed for model training and optimizes heterogeneous chip utilization, inference costs, and deployment efficiency through Zhongke Jiahe's software stack. 中科加禾源自中科院计算所编译实验室，业务覆盖编译器、Runtime 和推理引擎。智谱把数据中心用于补充模型训练所需计算资源，并通过中科加禾的软件栈优化异构芯片利用率、推理成本和部署效率。

These two actions cover hardware computing power supply and heterogeneous computing power software stack, respectively: the former provides large-scale training clusters, and the latter is responsible for enabling different domestic chips to perform training and inference tasks more effectively. 这两项动作分别覆盖硬件算力供给和异构算力软件栈：前者提供大规模训练集群，后者负责让不同国产芯片更有效地执行训练与推理任务。

item.title: 韩国拟建 5400 亿美元 AI 芯片园区，电力和用水成为瓶颈
item.guid: 韩国拟建-5400-亿美元-AI-芯片园区，电力和用水成为瓶颈
item.description:
According to Reuters, South Korea plans to build the Honam Semiconductor Industrial Park in the southwest, with an estimated investment of at least 800 trillion Korean won, aiming to form four wafer fabs by 2030. Analysts estimate that the electricity demand of the four factories could be equivalent to 70% to 80% of the current annual electricity consumption of Gwangju, North Jeolla Province, and South Jeolla Province. 据路透社报道，韩国计划在西南部建设 Honam 半导体产业园，预计投资至少 800 万亿韩元，目标在 2030 年前形成四座晶圆厂。分析人士估算，四座工厂的用电需求可能相当于光州、全罗北道和全罗南道目前年度用电量的 70% 至 80%。

The park is expected to require approximately 650,000 tons of water daily, exceeding Gwangju residents' daily water consumption. Government plans include using recycled water, diverting five dams, and raising the Dongbok Dam, but transmission lines, nuclear power expansion, and dam projects all face consultation and resettlement disputes with local residents. 园区每日预计需要约 65 万吨水，超过光州市居民日用水量。政府方案包括使用再生水、调度五座水坝并加高东福水坝，但输电线路、核电扩建和水坝工程均面临当地居民的咨询与安置争议。

Samsung and Hynix's chip park under construction in Yongin near Seoul also experienced delays due to power and water supply issues. South Korea's energy department states that the existing power generation in the southwest region is higher than local demand and will consider underground transmission lines, nuclear power plants, and small modular reactors, but local residents demand participation in dam and energy facility decisions before project implementation. 三星与海力士在首尔附近龙仁建设的芯片园区也曾因供电和供水延误。韩国能源部门称，西南地区现有发电量高于当地需求，将考虑地下输电线路、核电站和小型模块化反应堆，但当地居民要求在项目落地前参与水坝与能源设施决策。

item.title: CuspAI 联合英伟达、Meta 和三星建立 AI 材料工厂
item.guid: CuspAI-联合英伟达、Meta-和三星建立-AI-材料工厂
item.description:
British materials discovery company CuspAI launched the AI Materials Foundry program, hoping to use a unified intelligent agent to coordinate materials design, simulation, and synthesis processes. Its MIRA platform is responsible for connecting participants' models, experimental data, and verification capabilities, addressing material bottlenecks in semiconductors, clean energy, and advanced manufacturing. 英国材料发现公司 CuspAI 发布 AI Materials Foundry 计划，希望用统一智能体协调材料设计、模拟和合成流程。其 MIRA 平台负责连接参与方的模型、实验数据和验证能力，面向半导体、清洁能源和先进制造中的材料瓶颈。

The first members include companies such as 3M, AMD, Applied Materials, Meta, Nvidia, Samsung, Hyundai Motor, Kioxia, Lam Research, Merck, Tokyo Electron, and Fujifilm, and also connects with multiple academic institutions. 首批成员包括 3M、AMD、应用材料、Meta、英伟达、三星、现代汽车、铠侠、泛林、默克、东京电子和富士胶片等企业，并接入多家学术机构。

item.title: 三星成立直属 CEO 的机器人事业部 RX
item.guid: 三星成立直属-CEO-的机器人事业部-RX
item.description:
Samsung Electronics announced the establishment of the Robotics eXperience (RX) division, reporting directly to the CEO, responsible for mid-to-long-term robotics strategy, core technology R&D, and business execution. Lee Dong-geon, who previously led robotics strategy for Hyundai Motor Group and Boston Dynamics, will lead the robotics strategy team. 三星电子宣布成立 Robotics eXperience（RX）事业部，直接向 CEO 汇报，负责中长期机器人战略、核心技术研发和商业执行。曾负责现代汽车集团及波士动力机器人战略的李东健将领导机器人战略团队。

Samsung also plans to establish robotics research centers in the United States, China, and Japan. The company plans to first use humanoid robots in manufacturing factories, then expand to home and retail scenarios, and retains the option to supplement technology through investment, acquisition, and external cooperation. 三星还计划在美国、中国和日本设立机器人研究中心。公司准备先把人形机器人用于制造工厂，再扩展至家庭和零售场景，并保留通过投资、收购和外部合作补充技术的选项。

At its earnings conference in January this year, Samsung stated its intention to deliver visible results for its humanoid robot business within the year, and in April, it further indicated that it would use investment and M&A when necessary to accelerate R&D and commercialization. 三星在今年 1 月业绩会上提出要在年内拿出人形机器人业务的可见成果，4 月又表示会在必要时采用投资和并购加快研发及商业化。

item.title: Momenta Robotaxi 获深圳道路测试许可
item.guid: Momenta-Robotaxi-获深圳道路测试许可
item.description:
Momenta announced that its Robotaxi has obtained a road test permit for intelligent connected vehicles in Shenzhen and will begin actual road testing soon. Shenzhen becomes another city where the company has landed in China, following Shanghai, Suzhou, and Wuxi. Momenta 宣布，其 Robotaxi 获得深圳市智能网联汽车道路测试许可，将在近期开始实地测试。深圳成为该公司在中国境内继上海、苏州和无锡之后落地的又一城市。

Momenta has expanded overseas into Munich, Germany, and Abu Dhabi, UAE, collaborating with Uber, Grab, Lumo, Xiangdao Chuxing, and Mercedes-Benz. Among these, the Robotaxi project with Uber is planned to launch operational services in Munich this year. Momenta 在海外已进入德国慕尼黑和阿联酋阿布扎比，并与 Uber、Grab、Lumo、享道出行及梅赛德斯-奔驰合作。其中与 Uber 的 Robotaxi 项目计划今年在慕尼黑启动运营服务。

item.title: 丰田将精简零部件种类并下调盈亏平衡产量
item.guid: 丰田将精简零部件种类并下调盈亏平衡产量
item.description:
Toyota Motor President Kenta Kinoshita stated that the company will reduce the variety of parts, improve factory space utilization, production efficiency, and development speed, while also seeking to lower the currently high break-even production volume. 丰田汽车社长近健太表示，公司将减少零部件种类，提高工厂空间利用率、生产效率和开发速度，同时设法下调目前偏高的盈亏平衡产量。

Toyota also plans to unify specification terminology across its planning, production, and sales departments, streamlining approximately 45,000 professional terms to 5,000, and cutting about 30% of intermediate processes. Kenta Kinoshita said the company will continue to maintain its domestic production scale in Japan and work with suppliers to optimize designs, quality, and costs. 丰田还计划统一企划、生产和销售部门的规格术语，把约 4.5 万个专业术语精简至 5000 个，并削减约 30% 的中间流程。近健太称，公司会继续维持日本国内生产规模，并与供应商共同优化图纸、质量和成本。

item.title: 蚂蚁国际完成约 12 亿美元 A 轮融资
item.guid: 蚂蚁国际完成约-12-亿美元-A-轮融资
item.description:
Ant International today announced the completion of its Series A financing round of approximately US$1.2 billion, with existing shareholders such as Ant Group and Alibaba, as well as multiple international investment institutions participating. The company stated that the funds will be used to expand global business, increase investment in cutting-edge technologies like AI, and continue to expand cross-border payment and global account services. 蚂蚁国际今日宣布完成约 12 亿美元 A 轮融资，蚂蚁集团、阿里巴巴等现有股东以及多家国际投资机构参与。公司称，资金将用于扩展全球业务、增加 AI 等前沿技术投入，并继续拓展跨境支付和全球账户服务。

Bloomberg reported in June that Ant International planned to raise approximately US$1 billion, targeting a valuation of over US$10 billion; the actual financing scale in this round is higher than what was reported at the time. Ant International did not disclose the post-investment valuation of this round or the specific contributions of each investor in its announcement. 彭博社 6 月曾报道，蚂蚁国际计划募资约 10 亿美元、目标估值超过 100 亿美元；本轮实际融资规模高于当时报道。蚂蚁国际没有在公告中披露本轮投后估值和各投资方的具体出资额。

item.title: 索尼音乐起诉 AI 音乐公司 Udio，涉及超过 3 万段录音
item.guid: 索尼音乐起诉-AI-音乐公司-Udio，涉及超过-3-万段录音
item.description:
Sony Music has again sued AI music company Udio in the U.S. District Court for the Southern District of New York, alleging that it illegally copied over 30,000 sound recordings to train its model without permission. Sony stated that these recordings are only a small fraction of the hundreds of thousands of recordings already identified; its initial lawsuit in 2024 only listed 333 recordings. 索尼音乐在纽约南区联邦地区法院再次起诉 AI 音乐公司 Udio，指控其未经许可复制超过 3 万段录音训练模型。索尼称，这批录音只是已识别数十万条录音中的一小部分；其 2024 年首次起诉时只列出 333 份录音。

Udio previously argued that its training use constituted fair use and had reached settlements with Universal Music and Warner Music. In its new complaint, Sony cited the existence of a licensing market to refute Udio's claim that there is no identifiable market for such training inputs. Udio 此前主张训练使用属于合理使用，并已与环球音乐、华纳音乐达成和解。索尼在新诉状中则援引授权市场的存在，反驳 Udio 关于相关训练投入品不存在可识别市场的说法。

item.title: 💡 黄震昕：SOTA 模型应该有自己的定价权
item.guid: 💡-黄震昕：SOTA-模型应该有自己的定价权
item.description:
Huang Zhenxin, head of enterprise business at Moonshot AI, stated in an interview with 21st Century Business Herald that the value of cutting-edge models should not be measured solely by low prices. This response addresses industry controversies surrounding pricing, computing power shortages, and the open-source roadmap after the release of Kimi K3. 月之暗面企业业务负责人黄震昕在接受 21 世纪经济报道采访时表示，前沿模型的价值不应只用低价衡量。这番回应针对 Kimi K3 发布后围绕定价、算力紧张和开源路线的行业争议。

He stated that Kimi will continue to be open source, but open-source and closed-source services cater to different needs: customers requiring private deployment and fine-tuning will choose open-source models, while those wishing to directly purchase hosted services may opt for closed-source services. Open source itself does not determine the quality and price of tokens. 他表示，Kimi 会继续开源，但开源与闭源服务面向不同需求：需要私有化部署和微调的客户会选择开源模型，希望直接购买托管服务的客户则可能选择闭源服务，开源本身并不决定 Token 的质量和价格。

Huang Zhenxin said that Moonshot AI focuses its model capabilities on specialized tasks such as programming, finance, law, and science, without simultaneously expanding into entertainment, image, and video generation. Regarding the hallucination problem that large models cannot completely eliminate, K3 will incorporate a fact-checking sub-agent into Agent Swarm, allowing another agent to review the output instead of directly providing uncertain information to users. 黄震昕称，月之暗面把模型能力集中在编程、金融、法律和科学等专业任务，而没有同时扩张到娱乐、图片和视频生成。对于大模型无法彻底消除的幻觉问题，K3 会在 Agent Swarm 中加入事实核查子智能体，让另一个智能体复核输出，而不是把不确定信息直接交给用户。

In terms of commercialization, he revealed that API calls account for the highest proportion of Kimi's enterprise revenue, and the company currently does not offer private deployment. The recent suspension of new user registrations is because demand has exceeded resource capacity. The team prioritizes ensuring the experience of paying users, and then restores services through model performance optimization and additional computing power. 在商业化方面，他透露 Kimi 的企业收入中 API 调用占比最高，公司目前不做私有化部署。近期暂停新用户注册，是因为需求超过资源承载能力，团队优先保障付费用户体验，再通过模型效能优化和补充算力恢复服务。

item.title: Halliday G2 AI 眼镜发布：双目光波导显示，续航超过 12 小时
item.guid: Halliday-G2-AI-眼镜发布：双目光波导显示，续航超过-12-小时
item.description:
Halliday yesterday released its second-generation AI glasses, Halliday G2, featuring the "Meeting Flow" real-time meeting assistance function. Through capabilities such as real-time subtitles, translation, information retrieval, topic tracking, decision confirmation, and action item tracking, the product helps users synchronize information, clarify decisions, and follow-up actions during meetings. Halliday 昨日发布第二代 AI 眼镜 Halliday G2，主打「Meeting Flow」实时会议辅助功能。产品通过实时字幕、翻译、信息检索、话题追踪、决策确认和待解决事项追踪等能力，帮助用户在会议进行过程中同步信息、明确决策与后续行动。

    Equipped with a dual-eye waveguide display system, using dual Micro-LED projection, with a peak brightness of up to 1,600 nits and a single-eye resolution of 600 × 300;

    Features a camera-free design, suitable for scenarios where recording devices are inconvenient, such as meetings, business communications, and confidential office work, and supports optional prescription lenses;

    Offers real-time translation in over 45 languages, Halliday AI assistant, teleprompter mode, low-light privacy display mode, phone calls, and music playback, among other features;

    Equipped with a 4-microphone array, supporting voice pickup within a range of approximately 2 meters, and capable of distinguishing between the wearer's voice input and other speakers', with over 12 hours of battery life for daily use.

The product retail price is US$599. Users can now pay a US$10 deposit to pre-order and receive a US$100 discount on the final purchase price. The first batch of products is expected to start shipping in September 2026. 产品零售价为 599 美元，用户现可支付 10 美元订金预订，并获得最终购买价格减免 100 美元的优惠，首批产品预计于 2026 年 9 月开始发货。

item.title: 曝 iQOO16T 测试 2nm 骁龙芯片和主动散热风扇
item.guid: 曝-iQOO16T-测试-2nm-骁龙芯片和主动散热风扇
item.description:
According to blogger "Digital Chat Station," the iQOO 16T is testing a 2nm chip codenamed SM8950, which is expected to correspond to the unreleased Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6; MediaTek Dimensity 9600 is also among the candidate solutions. 据博主「数码闲聊站」爆料，iQOO 16T 正在测试代号 SM8950 的 2nm 芯片，外界预计其对应尚未发布的骁龙 8 Elite Gen 6；联发科天玑 9600 也在候选方案中。

The leak also states that the phone will feature a Samsung 2K flat screen and a built-in active cooling fan. The iQOO 15T was just released two months ago, so the 16T may not be launched this year. 爆料还称，手机采用三星 2K 直屏并内置主动散热风扇。iQOO 15T 两个月前才发布，因此 16T 不一定会在今年上市。

item.title: 13.33 万元，蔚来 firefly 萤火虫发布首款 halo 车型
item.guid: 13.33-万元，蔚来-firefly-萤火虫发布首款-halo-车型
item.description:
On July 20, NIO's sub-brand firefly released its first model in the halo "Xungu" series, "Habitat," priced at 133,300 yuan. When using the BaaS battery rental solution, the price is 93,300 yuan, with only one version available. 7 月 20 日，蔚来旗下品牌 firefly 萤火虫发布 halo 寻光系列首款车型「栖息地」，售价 13.33 万元，采用 BaaS 电池租用方案时售价为 9.33 万元，仅提供一个版本。

"Habitat" is largely consistent with the regular Firefly in terms of power and body size, equipped with a 120 kW rear motor and a 42.1 kWh battery, with a CLTC range of 420 km, a length of 4003 mm, and a wheelbase of 2615 mm. 「栖息地」在动力和车身尺寸方面与普通版萤火虫基本一致，搭载 120 kW 后置电机和 42.1 kWh 电池，CLTC 续航里程为 420 km，车长 4003 mm，轴距 2615 mm。

The new car's upgrades mainly focus on design and interior. The exterior features a "Serene Green" metallic paint, close to dark green, equipped with "Light Firefly Green Flowing Light" logo lights and "Starlight Trajectory Firefly" two-tone wheels, the latter using the same process as the NIO ES9. 新车的升级主要集中在设计和内饰。外观采用接近墨绿色的「静谧绿」金属车漆，配备「轻萤绿流光」 logo 灯和「星轨流萤」双色轮圈，后者采用与蔚来 ES9 相同的工艺。

The interior uses green as the main color, featuring relaxed green solvent-free soft-touch leather and "Forest Moss" soft-touch blended fabric, with light green accents added through details like seat belts, stitching, and steering wheel logos. 车内则以绿色为主色调，使用松弛绿无溶剂软触革、「林间苔藓」柔感混纺织物，并通过安全带、缝线、方向盘 logo 等细节加入浅绿色点缀。

🔗 Related reading: Priced at 133,300 yuan, the Firefly Halo Seeker series releases its first model, 7,500 yuan more expensive than the high-end version 🔗 相关阅读： 定价 13.33 万元，萤火虫 halo 寻光系列发布首款车型，比高配版还贵 7500 元

item.title: 阿里发布 Qwen-Image-3.0，支持 4.5k Token 复杂图文指令
item.guid: 阿里发布-Qwen-Image-3.0，支持-4.5k-Token-复杂图文指令
item.description:
Alibaba yesterday released its third-generation image generation foundation model, Qwen-Image-3.0, increasing the maximum input length to 4.5k Tokens. It can process complex content such as formulas, geometric shapes, logical deduction steps, multi-layer UI, and storyboards within a single image. Officially, the new model supports native rendering for 12 languages and over 20 fonts, pushing small text rendering accuracy to approximately 10 pixels. 阿里昨日发布第三代图像生成基础模型 Qwen-Image-3.0，将最大输入长度提升至 4.5k Token，可在一张图中处理公式、几何图形、逻辑推导步骤、多层 UI 和分镜等复杂内容。官方称，新模型支持 12 种语言和 20 多款字体的原生渲染，并把小字渲染精度推进到约 10 像素。

The model adopts an integrated architecture for image generation and editing. The text rendering, detail, and knowledge capabilities accumulated during the text-to-image stage can be used for ancient painting restoration, panoramic image generation, sketch-to-PPT conversion, and multi-shot generation. Official examples also include generating a nine-grid knowledge diagram in one go, and establishing multi-layer interface nesting between VS Code, Qwen, chat windows, and posters. 模型采用生图与编辑一体化架构，文生图阶段积累的文字渲染、细节和知识能力可用于古画修复、全景图生成、草图转 PPT 和多镜头生成。官方展示的示例还包括一次生成九宫格知识图解，以及在 VS Code、千问、聊天窗口和海报之间建立多层界面嵌套。

Alibaba Cloud Bailian and Qwen AI platforms have opened API invitation testing, and Qwen Studio and Qwen App will subsequently offer free trials. 阿里云百炼与千问 AI 平台已开放 API 邀测，Qwen Studio 和千问 App 将随后提供免费体验。

item.title: 高德上线六位数「位置口令」
item.guid: 高德上线六位数「位置口令」
item.description:
Amap has launched "Location Passcode," allowing users to convert a map location into a six-digit number, which can be shared via chat, phone, or in-person verbal communication. Recipients can enter the passcode in Amap to open the corresponding location. 高德地图上线「位置口令」，用户可以把地图位置转换成六位数字，通过聊天、电话或线下口述分享。接收者在高德地图中输入口令即可打开对应地点。

The passcode is suitable for scenarios lacking standard house numbers, temporary meeting points, and situations where sending long links is inconvenient. The six-digit number only serves as a location index and does not replace address names or map coordinates. 口令适用于缺少标准门牌、临时集合点和不便发送长链接的场景。六位数字只承担位置索引，不替代地址名称和地图坐标。

item.title: 小鹏发布视觉大模型 TuringViT
item.guid: 小鹏发布视觉大模型-TuringViT
item.description:
Xpeng has released its large vision model, TuringViT, integrating image encoding, spatio-temporal feature extraction, and training processes for autonomous driving visual tasks into a unified architecture. The company states that this model is designed for high-resolution, multi-camera, and long-sequence inputs, and controls computational load for in-vehicle deployment. 小鹏发布视觉大模型 TuringViT，把自动驾驶视觉任务中的图像编码、时空特征提取和训练流程放入统一架构。公司称，该模型面向高分辨率、多摄像头和长时序输入，并针对车端部署控制计算量。

TuringViT will be used for Xpeng's autonomous driving model training and inference, subsequently aligning with the company's VLA roadmap. Public materials focus on the training architecture and in-vehicle efficiency, without releasing it as a standalone consumer product. TuringViT 将用于小鹏自动驾驶模型训练与推理，后续与公司的 VLA 路线配合。公开材料把重点放在训练架构和车端效率，没有把它作为独立消费产品发布。

item.title: 腾讯混元发布科学发现智能体 Hyra-1.0
item.guid: 腾讯混元发布科学发现智能体-Hyra-1.0
item.description:
Tencent Hunyuan has launched Hyra-1.0, the first version of the Hunyuan Research Agent, designed for performance-oriented research and engineering tasks. In each run, the system reads historical plans, logs, evaluator feedback, and source code, generates new plans, and continues to iterate until it actively terminates or the budget is exhausted. 腾讯混元推出 Hyra-1.0，这是 Hunyuan Research Agent 的首个版本，面向以性能为目标的研究与工程任务。系统在每轮运行中读取历史方案、日志、评估器反馈和源代码，生成新方案并继续迭代，直到主动结束或预算耗尽。

Tencent's demonstrated case requires Hyra to generate a renderable 3D model based on a 2D reference image, which is then scored by a visual language model across dimensions such as contour, proportion, structure, material, and visual similarity. The agent continuously modifies modeling code and rendering parameters, retaining the historically optimal results. 腾讯展示的案例要求 Hyra 根据一张二维参考图生成可渲染的三维模型，再由视觉语言模型从轮廓、比例、结构、材质和视觉相似度等维度评分。智能体会连续修改建模代码和渲染参数，并保留历史最优结果。

Hyra's framework is deliberately kept lightweight, leaving more action space for the agent. Each round can read the source code and evaluation logs of previous solutions, rather than just continuing to generate based on the last output. Hyra 的框架刻意保持轻量，把更多动作空间留给智能体。每一轮都可以读取先前方案的源代码与评估日志，而非只根据最后一次输出继续生成。

item.title: 中央网信办上半年处置 759 个仿冒假冒网站
item.guid: 中央网信办上半年处置-759-个仿冒假冒网站
item.description:
The Cyberspace Administration of China's Reporting Center disclosed that in the first half of this year, 759 imitation and fake websites were transferred for disposal, a year-on-year increase of 150%. Among them, 310 imitated institutional websites, 313 imitated enterprise websites, and 127 imitated party and government websites. 中央网信办举报中心披露，今年上半年转交处置仿冒假冒网站 759 个，同比增加 150%。其中仿冒事业单位网站 310 个、企业网站 313 个、党政机关网站 127 个。

Imitated targets include the Ministry of Human Resources and Social Security, Xiong'an New Area, academic journal submission channels, schools, hospitals, Sinopharm Group, and Mixue Bingcheng. These websites often collect personal information or charge fees under the guise of subsidy applications, qualification certifications, submissions, and enterprise services. 仿冒对象包括人力资源和社会保障部、雄安新区、学术期刊投稿渠道、学校、医院、国药集团和蜜雪冰城。相关网站常以补贴申领、资格认证、投稿和企业服务为名收集个人信息或收费。

item.title: 索尼 WH-1000XM6 曝光第六种绿色版本
item.guid: 索尼-WH-1000XM6-曝光第六种绿色版本
item.description:
Retailer Falabella's page showed renders of a green version of the Sony WH-1000XM6, with a color close to olive green or sage green. This would be the sixth color option for the headphones, following black, midnight blue, platinum silver, sand pink, and sandstone. 零售商 Falabella 页面出现绿色版索尼 WH-1000XM6 渲染图，颜色接近橄榄绿或鼠尾草绿。这将是该耳机继黑色、午夜蓝、铂金银、沙粉色和砂岩色之后的第六种配色。

Sony has not yet announced the official name, launch markets, or release date for this color. The headphone hardware specifications are expected to be the same as the existing WH-1000XM6. 索尼尚未公布这一配色的正式名称、上市市场和发售时间，耳机硬件规格预计与现有 WH-1000XM6 相同。

The renders came from a retailer's page, not a Sony new product announcement; currently, the only public change involves the exterior color. 渲染图来自零售商页面，而不是索尼新品公告；目前公开变化只涉及外观颜色。

item.title: 招商银行、平安银行万事达卡接入 Apple Pay
item.guid: 招商银行、平安银行万事达卡接入-Apple-Pay
item.description:
Mastercard announced that China Merchants Bank credit and debit cards, and Ping An Bank credit cards now support binding to Apple Pay. Mainland Chinese cardholders can use locally issued Mastercard cards for payments at overseas offline merchants and on international apps and websites. 万事达卡宣布，招商银行信用卡和借记卡、平安银行信用卡已支持绑定 Apple Pay。中国内地持卡人可以在境外线下商户及海外应用、网站使用本地发行的万事达卡支付。

China Merchants Bank also offers a maximum of $5 cashback for first-time card users, and completing ten overseas transactions allows participation in a 500 yuan prize draw. In April this year, Agricultural Bank of China, Bank of China, CITIC Bank, and SPD Bank, among others, became the first batch of mainland China Mastercard issuers to access Apple Pay. 招商银行同时为首次绑卡用户提供最高 5 美元返现，完成十笔境外消费还可参与 500 元礼遇抽奖。今年 4 月，农业银行、中国银行、中信银行和浦发银行等已成为首批接入 Apple Pay 的中国内地万事达卡发卡行。

item.title: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布中国独家预告，7 月 29 日上映
item.guid: 《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》发布中国独家预告，7-月-29-日上映
item.description:
Sony and Marvel released a China-exclusive trailer for 'Spider-Man: A New Day.' The film will be released in mainland China on July 29, two days earlier than in North America. The story follows 'Spider-Man: No Way Home,' with Peter Parker living alone in New York and continuing to fight crime four years after being forgotten by everyone. 索尼与漫威发布《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》中国独家预告，影片将于 7 月 29 日在中国内地上映，比北美早两天。故事承接《蜘蛛侠：英雄无归》，彼得·帕克被所有人遗忘四年后独自在纽约生活并继续打击犯罪。

Tom Holland, Zendaya, and Jacob Batalon return, joined by Mark Ruffalo, Jon Bernthal, Sadie Sink, and others. Destin Daniel Cretton directs, and the Jackie Chan Stunt Team serves as action directors. 汤姆·霍兰德、赞达亚和雅各布·巴特朗回归，马克·鲁法洛、乔·伯恩瑟、萨迪·辛克等加入。德斯汀·丹尼尔·克雷顿执导，成家班担任动作导演。

item.title: 《惊声尖笑 6》上线数字平台
item.guid: 《惊声尖笑-6》上线数字平台
item.description:
The horror-comedy film 'Scary Movie 6' launched on digital platforms today, releasing three parody posters for 'Obsession,' 'Odyssey,' and 'The Ice Cream Man.' The Wayans brothers are collaborating on the series again after an 18-year hiatus since the first installment. 恐怖喜剧片《惊声尖笑 6》今日上线数字平台，并发布恶搞《痴迷》《奥德赛》和《冰淇淋人》的三款海报。韦恩斯兄弟在第一部之后时隔 18 年再次共同参与这一系列。

The film was in theaters for approximately 45 days, with a production cost of about $30 million, grossing over $230 million worldwide, of which North American box office was approximately $108 million. 影片院线上映约 45 天，制作成本约 3000 万美元，全球票房超过 2.3 亿美元，其中北美票房约 1.08 亿美元。

The digital release continues the series' consistent parody approach to genre films, with three new posters corresponding to the visual elements of this year's theatrical releases. 数字版上线继续使用系列一贯的类型片恶搞路线，三张新海报分别对应今年院线片的视觉元素。

item.title: 《汪汪队立大功：勇闯恐龙岛》开启预售
item.guid: 《汪汪队立大功：勇闯恐龙岛》开启预售
item.description:
'PAW Patrol: Dino Rescue' released a new trailer and opened for pre-sales, with sneak previews from July 25 to 31, and official release on August 8. 《汪汪队立大功：勇闯恐龙岛》发布新预告并开启预售，7 月 25 日至 31 日点映，8 月 8 日正式上映。

Carl Brunker continues to direct, with voice actors Iain Armitage, Marsai Martin, Mckenna Grace, Ron Pardo, and Yara Shahidi returning, and the Backstreet Boys performing the theme song. 卡尔·布伦克尔继续执导，伊恩·阿米蒂奇、马塞·马丁、麦肯娜·格瑞丝、罗恩·帕多和雅拉·莎希迪等配音演员回归，后街男孩演唱主题曲。

The third installment takes the PAW Patrol to Dino Island, where the dog characters will embark on an adventure with dinosaurs; sneak previews, mainland China release, and North American release are divided into three consecutive windows. 第三部把汪汪队带到恐龙岛，狗狗角色将与恐龙共同展开冒险；点映、内地公映和北美公映分成三个连续档期。
